# Hachipoo Apps

> Machine-readable site summary for AI assistants and search tools. See also: sitemap at /sitemap-index.xml

## Site

- **Name:** Hachipoo Apps
- **URL:** https://hachipoo.com
- **Focus:** Native macOS utilities; primary product is Dockside.

## Dockside (macOS app)

Dockside is a **native Mac file shelf** that sits beside the **Dock**. Users drag and drop files, folders, links, apps, and plain text for immediate or later use. It surfaces **recent screenshots and downloads**, supports **folder monitoring**, themes, and workflows (e.g. Shortcuts, AppleScript). It is **Apple Notarized**, runs **offline** (no cloud storage of user files), and targets **macOS 13 (Ventura) and later**.

- **Product page:** https://hachipoo.com/dockside-app
- **Trial:** 14-day free trial
- **License:** One-time lifetime purchase (USD 5.99) via Gumroad (`https://hachipoo.gumroad.com/l/dockside`)
- **Download (DMG):** Latest release on GitHub (`https://github.com/PrajwalSD/Dockside/releases`)
- **Roadmap / feedback:** https://dockside.featurebase.app/roadmap
- **Integrations (third-party):** https://hachipoo.com/integrations
- **Usage tips:** https://hachipoo.com/dockside-usage-tips

Dockside is a **Dock companion**, not a Dock replacement. It follows the Dock across displays and supports multiple monitors and Spaces.

## Other key URLs

- Blog: https://hachipoo.com/blog
- Contact / support: https://hachipoo.com/contact
- Privacy: https://hachipoo.com/privacy
- Terms: https://hachipoo.com/terms

## Press / discovery (examples)

Dockside has been discussed on r/macapps, Product Hunt, AppAddict, Softpedia, and similar outlets; links appear on the Dockside product page.

## Contact

Use the contact form on https://hachipoo.com/contact for support or partnership questions.
